title: James Webb Space Telescope performs brain surgery on mysterious 'Exposed Cranium Nebula'
description: The nebula is possibly being produced by a type of unstable star called a Wolf–Rayet star.
content: The nebula is possibly being produced by a type of unstable star called a Wolf–Rayet star.
